user.title: Life Control MCLH-09 BLE
user.description: Add one or more BLE MAC addresses. One device per line. Supported formats: `AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF`, `AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF; Name`, `Name; AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF`.

data.raw_soil: Publish raw soil value instead of calibrated percent

error.invalid_devices: Device list is invalid. Check MAC addresses, duplicates and line format.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Life Control MCLH-09 BLE integration instance is allowed. Add more devices in integration options.
abort.already_configured: Life Control MCLH-09 BLE is already configured.
